falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score exceeds 60 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 indicates extreme momentum, contradicting the current HOLD signal and suggesting a potential reversal or blowoff top rather than a continuation of the 2024_aug bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above $50,000 (key resistance from bottom_2024_aug pattern) with a 3%+ gain in a single session
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Breaking key resistance with a sharp upward move would invalidate the 76% similarity to the bottom pattern, indicating a bullish breakout rather than a consolidation or reversal phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to >2.5x the 200-day average on a confirmation candle (e.g., bullish engulfing pattern) at the current price level
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A massive volume surge with a clear reversal candlestick pattern would directly contradict the HOLD signal, proving a high-probability trend change rather than a false breakout or continuation.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
